title: Huawei 1.25G SFP optical transceiver, SM, 1550nm, 40km, 2x LC konektor, DDM
description: The Huawei S-SFP-GE-LH40 is a single-mode 1.25G SFP module with a wavelength of 1550nm and two LC connectors for connections up to a distance of 40km The LC connectors in the SFP module have UPC polishing
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 1 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1550 Distance [km] 40 Transfer type 2-fiber Polishing type UPC Tx power [dBm] 5 up to 0 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 22 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
